description: Node.js project configuration for Renovate. Bun versions cannot be updated through package.json packageManager because Corepack and Renovate do not support Bun there; use .bun-version with package-managers/bun instead.

packageRules.description: Wait for npm releases to mature before raising update branches
Do not require minimum release age for package-manager controlled lockfile maintenance
prBodyNotes: Renovate lock file maintenance delegates updates to the package manager, so confirm the package manager enforces its own minimum release age policy.

packageRules.description: Do not require minimum release age for package replacements
prBodyNotes: Renovate replacement updates do not reliably carry release age metadata, so manually confirm the package age before merging.

packageRules.description: Do not require minimum release age for package pinning
prBodyNotes: Renovate pin updates do not reliably carry release age metadata, so manually confirm the package age before merging.
